title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery · Mastery Check
summary: Harden a loop that calls unreliable external services. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a fault-injected recovery harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use bounded retries with backoff and error classification.
Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.
Checkpoint durable state so a process can restart without replaying completed effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
